positive: A celestial owl perched on a crescent moon, viewed against a deep indigo night sky filled with sparkling nebula gas. The owl has striking, geometric feather patterns rendered in glowing gold and cyan lines. The composition is highly symmetrical and centralized, focusing on the owl and moon as clean silhouettes. The style is vibrant cosmic gothic, combining elements of Art Nouveau curvature with modern, graphic pop art lines. High contrast, luminescent glow effect, limited palette of indigo, gold, cyan, and deep violet. Intricate details suitable for direct printing on apparel, vector-like precision.
negative: blur, fuzzy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, messy, dirty, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts
